UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Sigrid Irias; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff in pro per Erika Ortiz is present.
Defendant Justin Hodges is present.
Attorney Ashley L. Shively appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of APR-13-2015 is vacated. (501/JPT)
